current_chart_value: Joe L. Gwaltney, a 78-year-old male, is being referred for home health care following a recent lumbar laminectomy and decompression surgery performed on February 2, 2026. His primary diagnosis includes lumbar spondylosis (ICD-10: M47.896) along with secondary diagnoses of connective tissue stenosis of the neural canal (M99.43), spinal stenosis with neurogenic claudication (M48.062), and other low back pain (M54.59).
